title: Crohn's Disease and Axial Spondyloarthritis: From Systemic Inflammation to Amyloidosis.
snippet: Crohn's disease (CD) is frequently complicated by extraintestinal manifestations, including axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA). Both diseases share genetic (HLA-B27, IL23R, ERAP1/2) and immunopathological mechanisms (Th17/IL-23 axis). Their co-occurrence increases the risk of systemic complications such as AA amyloidosis.We report a 42-year-old male with HLA-B...
